import yaml
src  = yaml.safe_load\(open\('../python/analysis_city.yaml', encoding='utf-8'\)\)
dst  = yaml.safe_load\(open\('../configs/daily_sales/analysis_daily_sales.yaml', encoding='utf-8'\)\)
dst['prompts'] = src['prompts']
open\('../configs/daily_sales/analysis_daily_sales.yaml', 'w', encoding='utf-8'\).write\(
    yaml.dump\(dst, allow_unicode=True, sort_keys=False, default_flow_style=False\)
\)
print\('prompts 块已还原'\)
")

Bash(source .venv/bin/activate && python3 -c "
import os, json, requests
from dotenv import load_dotenv
from pathlib import Path
load_dotenv\(Path\('.'\).parent / '.env'\)

api_key = os.environ.get\('GEMINI_API_KEY'\)
model = os.environ.get\('GEMINI_MODEL', 'gemini-2.5-pro'\)
url = f'https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/models/{model}:generateContent?key={api_key}'

resp = requests.post\(url,
    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'},
    json={
        'contents': [{'role': 'user', 'parts': [{'text': 'Return JSON: {\\"items\\": [{\\"x\\": 1}]}'}]}],
        'generationConfig': {'temperature': 0},
    },
    timeout=60,
\)
data = resp.json\(\)
print\(json.dumps\(data, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\)[:800]\)
" 2>&1)

from pathlib import Path
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv\(Path\('..'\) / '.env'\)

from collect import playwright_login
import asyncio, requests, os, json

async def main\(\):
    cookie = await playwright_login\(\)
    url = 'https://bi.trendy-global.com/gapi/page/getPageDetail'
    headers = {'Cookie': cookie, 'Content-Type': 'application/json'}
    resp = requests.post\(url, headers=headers, json={'pageId': 'e0be35cef643848f5b4105d8'}, timeout=30\)
    data = resp.json\(\)
    print\(json.dumps\(data.get\('data', {}\).get\('page', {}\), ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\)[:500]\)

asyncio.run\(main\(\)\)
" 2>&1 | grep -v "^\\[" | head -30)

load_dotenv\(Path\('..'\) / '.env'\)

from collect import playwright_login
import asyncio, requests, os, json

async def main\(\):
    cookie = await playwright_login\(\)
    url = 'https://bi.trendy-global.com/gapi/page/getPageDetail'
    headers = {'Cookie': cookie, 'Content-Type': 'application/json'}
    resp = requests.post\(url, headers=headers, json={'pageId': 'e0be35cef643848f5b4105d8'}, timeout=30\)

asyncio.run\(main\(\)\)

Bash(source .venv/bin/activate && python3 -c "
from pathlib import Path
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv\(Path\('..'\) / '.env'\)
import os, requests, asyncio, json
from discover import playwright_login, make_session

BASE_URL = os.environ.get\('GY_BASE_URL', 'https://bi.trendy-global.com'\)
PG_ID = 'e0be35cef643848f5b4105d8'

async def main\(\):
    cookie = await playwright_login\(\)
    session = make_session\(cookie\)
    r = session.get\(f'{BASE_URL}/api/page/{PG_ID}', timeout=15\)
    data = r.json\(\).get\('data', {}\)
    for k, v in data.items\(\):
        if not isinstance\(v, \(list, dict\)\):
            print\(f'{k}: {v}'\)

asyncio.run\(main\(\)\)
" 2>&1 | grep -v "^\\[" | grep -v "Playwright\\|browser\\|chromium\\|Running")

from pathlib import Path
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv\(Path\('..'\) / '.env'\)
import os, requests, asyncio, json
from discover import playwright_login, make_session

BASE_URL = os.environ.get\('GY_BASE_URL', 'https://bi.trendy-global.com'\)
PG_ID = 'e0be35cef643848f5b4105d8'

async def main\(\):
    cookie = await playwright_login\(\)
    session = make_session\(cookie\)
    r = session.get\(f'{BASE_URL}/api/page/{PG_ID}', timeout=15\)
    data = r.json\(\)
    print\(json.dumps\(data, ensure_ascii=False\)[:1000]\)

asyncio.run\(main\(\)\)
" 2>&1 | tail -5)

Bash(python3 -c "
import json
from pathlib import Path
m = json.loads\(Path\('/Users/jian.yang/git_projects/claude-project/BI_AI_Robot/outputs/daily_sales/manifest_20260326.json'\).read_text\(\)\)
skc_keys = [k for k in m.keys\(\) if 'sell' in k.lower\(\) or 'Sell' in k or 'SellThrough' in k or 'skc' in k.lower\(\) or 'Skc' in k]
for key in skc_keys:
    card = m[key]
    cols = card.get\('columns', []\)
    rows = card.get\('rows', []\)
    print\(f'{key}: {len\(rows\)} 行, 列: {cols[:8]}'\)
    if rows:
        print\(f'  第一行: {list\(rows[0].items\(\)\)[:5]}'\)
    print\(\)
")
